titleStmt.title: SII 27.178: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 178. (A.R. No. 39 of 1938-39.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the second prākāra in the Raṅganātha temple.

It registers a royal gift of golden vessels, a gold plate covering and gold plated trappings (?) for the doors of the sajjā-gṛiha (retiring chamber) of god Raṅganātha, made during the regime of Avasarada Mallarasa. It gives in detail the weight and value of each item.
It is dated Śaka 1457, Jaya, Mārgaśira ba. 12, Wednesday corresponding to 1534 A.D., December 2. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī manmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara mūvaru rāyara gaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭa dikkurāya manōbhayaṁkara bhāṣege tappavarāyaragaṁḍa pūrva dakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara . pāṁḍyarājya sthāpanācāryya śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra Acyuta dēvarāyaru vijayanagaradallū pruthvīrājyaṁgaiuttirddu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1457 neya jayasaṁvatsarada mārgaśira ba 12 budhavāra puṇyakāladallu śrīraṁgada śrīraṁganātha dēvarige samarpisi kaḷuhacittaista cinnadasvarūpagaḷa vivarataṁma Ubhayavāgi naivēdyakke samarpisida ciṁnada hiriyaharivāṇa 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa 8 . llū cakratūga 4437 . taṁma paṭṭada dēviyaru varadājeṁmanavara Ubhayavāgi naivē .
dyakke samarpisida cikkaharivāṇa 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa 8 . llū . cakratūṁka ga 40100 taṁmakumāra cikkiveṁkaṭādrirāyara Ubhayavāgi celipāla naivēdyakke samarpisida ciṁnada hiriya baṭṭalu 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa 8 . llū cakratūka ga 931 . 2 sauṭu 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa 8 . llū cakratūka ga 74 . 1 Ā vijayanagaradallū samarppisi kaḷuha cittaista ciṁnnadasvarūpa 4 kaṁ baṁṇa llū cakratūka ga 945 . 7 mattaṁ śrīraṁgadallū Avasarada mallarasana pārupatyadalli taṁma Ubhayavāgi māḍisi cittaisi samarpisida ciṁnada pītāṁbarada svarūpa 1 kkaṁ 3 kkaṁ cakratūka 1 9921Þ2 ... ciṁnadakāḷāṁja 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa 8 . llū cakratūka
ga 21812 Ubhaya ra tūpa biga 2 kaṁ baṁṇa 4 kkaṁ cakratūka ga 10140 sajjāgṛhada bāgila bāgiluvāḍakke tāṁbradamēle toḍeda ciṁna baṁṇa ga 8 . llū cakratūkaga 667 Ubhayaṁ śrīraṁgadallū samarpisiddu nirupatoḍaku saḥ ciṁnabaṁṇa biga 5 kkaṁ cakratūka ga 10 807 Ā vijayanaga bi ga 2 kkaṁ samarppisiddu ciṁnna svarūpa bi ga 7 kkaṁ nānābaṁṇadalu cakratūka ga 70760 . 3 yī Ubhayalū Ācaṁdrākkavāgi śrī raṁganāthadēvarige naḍeya Uṁṭāddu . Eṁdu māḍida sēvege dharmmaśilāśāsana . śrī kruṣṇārpaṇamastu .
Digital edition of SII 27.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
